mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in >55% of instances when FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering risk-off portfolio rebalancing and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold crossing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate collapsing consumer demand, forcing corporate earnings downgrades and generating negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint declines in retail sales and housing starts fail to predict negative 20-day returns, with Rank IC below 0.02 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained industrial production growth above the 3-month moving average signals robust corporate output capacity and supply chain normalization, supporting earnings revisions and positive medium-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth above trend fails to correlate with positive 60-day returns during recovery phases, with out-of-sample accuracy below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index readings crossing above 305 signal accelerating inflation that compresses equity multiples, prompting institutional deleveraging and negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Returns are positive in >60% of instances when CPIAUCSL exceeds the 305 threshold, invalidating the inflation-fear transmission channel.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls indicate expanding economic activity and wage growth, boosting corporate revenue expectations and generating positive short-term equity returns through improved earnings momentum.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows no predictive power for 5-day returns, with Rank IC consistently near zero across all tested periods.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence where GDP growth accelerates while retail sales decelerate signals inventory buildup and weak final demand, leading to earnings cuts and negative medium-term returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The GDP-retail sales divergence pattern fails to predict negative 60-day returns, with positive returns dominating >55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: In a monetary tightening cycle, simultaneous industrial production expansion and falling unemployment indicate an overheating economy, prompting central bank hawkishness and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns dominate during tightening phases despite supply-labor strength, with signal accuracy falling below 48%.
